articles.title: Edmonton Oilers sign fast free agent forward as Bowman plan fires up again
articles.description: This in, news that the Edmonton Oilers have signed a fast forward as a free agent, inking Aku Raty, 24, from Finland. He will be on a one year two-way contract at $850,000. Raty had a big year in the American Hockey League in 2023-24, but struggled to make the Arizona/Utah NHL team after that.
